boardDescription: Turn collected source material into reusable automation reports.
projectDescription: Turn scoped source material into reusable reports.
projectDialogDesc: Configure the focus prompt, automation interval, and source scope for this project.
useAiToRefine: Use AI to refine the current prompt.
promptPlaceholder: Act as a product strategist. Look for product gaps and emerging needs...
webSearchDesc: Allow the AI to decide when live web search is needed for report generation and report discussion. If search is unavailable, the project still runs without it.
autoReportGenDesc: The app checks this project every configured interval and only generates a report when new scoped articles exist.
autoIntervalExample: Example: set to 60 to check once per hour.
maxArticlesDesc: Maximum number of articles used per automatic report generation.
minArticlesDesc: Minimum number of articles required for automatic report generation.
chooseSourcesDesc: Choose which news sources can feed this project.
allSourcesEligible: New and existing articles from every source will be eligible for this project.
reviewOptimizedDesc: Compare the original prompt with the AI rewrite, then choose whether to replace it.
favoriteFirstReport: Favorite a report to keep it pinned here.
generateFirstReport: Choose news articles and generate the first report for this project.
selectUpTo: Select up to {{count}} for this manual run.
includePreviouslyUsed: Include previously used articles for this project
noArticlesMatch: No articles match the current filters.
failedToMarkReportAsRead: Failed to mark report as read
failedToMarkAllReportsAsRead: Failed to mark all reports as read
deleteProjectDesc: Delete "{{name}}"? This permanently removes the project and all generated reports for it.
deleteProjectDescGeneric: Delete this project? This permanently removes the project and all generated reports for it.
discussReportDesc: Ask follow-up questions or expand the report with AI.
webSearchReady: Web search is enabled for this discussion. AI can look up live information when it is needed.
webSearchUnavailable: Web search is enabled for this project, but Tavily is not configured right now, so this discussion will fall back to normal model answers.
expandReport: Expand on this report with AI.
